strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js across multiple roles
Strong background in AI agent development and infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows)
Proven ability to deliver scalable solutions in high-load environments (millions of requests/sec)
concerns: Primary stack experience leans heavily on TypeScript/JavaScript with limited exposure to Kotlin/Java for backend services
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework in recent roles, though Jest experience is present
Some roles (e.g., GISCollective) show niche use of non-primary technologies (Dlang, Ember.js)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with deep TypeScript expertise and relevant Nest.js/React experience, though his backend service experience skews more toward JavaScript ecosystems. His recent work in AI agent infrastructure and high-load systems aligns well with the role's requirements, and his long career shows consistent delivery of scalable solutions. The primary concern is limited exposure to the secondary Kotlin/Java stack, though his polyglot background suggests adaptability.
